columns.extraction_plan: The number and percentage of participants with a PS score of 0 in the treatment arm (ADT plus D) is reported in Table 1, on page 3, under the row "ECOG performance status, n (%))" and sub-row "0". The value is "181 (99)".

The number and percentage of participants with a PS score of 0 in the control arm (ADT) is reported in Table 1, on page 3, under the row "ECOG performance status, n (%))" and sub-row "0". The value is "176 (96)".

The number and percentage of participants with a PS score of 1-2 in the treatment arm (ADT plus D) is reported in Table 1, on page 3, under the row "ECOG performance status, n (%))" and sub-row "1-2". The value is "2 (1)".

The number and percentage of participants with a PS score of 1-2 in the control arm (ADT) is reported in Table 1, on page 3, under the row "ECOG performance status, n (%))" and sub-row "1-2". The value is "7 (4)".
